entities.name: CLIMATE RISK MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The process of managing risks associated with climate variability in agricultural systems

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: A climatic region characterized by low and variable rainfall

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country in South Asia where smallholder farming is prevalent

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: A region of Africa characterized by semi-arid tropics

entities.name: AUSTRALIA
entities.description: A country with both large scale commercial and low rainfall cropping systems

entities.name: CLIMATE-INDUCED PRODUCTION RISK
entities.description: Risk to agricultural production caused by climate variability

entities.name: SEASON-TO-SEASON VARIABILITY OF RAINFALL
entities.description: Fluctuations in rainfall amounts from one season to the next

entities.name: RAINFED AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Farming that relies solely on rainfall for water

entities.name: RISK AVERSE STRATEGY
entities.description: A strategy where farmers avoid risks to protect their livelihoods

entities.name: RISK REDUCING MEASURES
entities.description: Actions taken to minimize the impact of climate risks

entities.name: CULTURAL TRADITIONS
entities.description: Social customs that influence farming and crop choices

entities.name: FOOD PREFERENCES
entities.description: Consumer or farmer preferences for specific types of food

entities.name: MARKET OPPORTUNITIES
entities.description: Availability of markets to sell agricultural produce

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER FARMING SYSTEMS
entities.description: Farming systems operated by small-scale farmers with limited resources

entities.name: FRAMEWORK FOR MANAGING CLIMATE VARIABILITY
entities.description: A structured approach to handle climate changes and variability to improve resilience

entities.name: RESILIENCE
entities.description: The ability of a farming system to recover from climate shocks

entities.name: SUSTAINABILITY
entities.description: The ability of a farming system to maintain productivity over the long term
